articles.title: Cardano founder says Trump assassination attempt is proof we need decentralization
articles.description: Cardano and Ethereum co-founder Charles Hoskinson has shared his thoughts on the assassination attempt on Donald Trump. He believes that the long-term solution is with the principles of crypto, such as disintermediation, decentralization, resilience, and integrity. Yesterday, Trump was targeted in an assassination attempt. The bullets narrowly missed him, grazing his right ear. If he […]
